title: National population estimates: At 31 December 2018 – Infoshare tables | Stats NZ
content:
## National population estimates: At 31 December 2018 – Infoshare tables
18 February 2019, 10:45am
National population estimates give the best available measure of the population, by age and sex, usually living in New Zealand.

## Access data in Infoshare
Use Infoshare to view and download time-series data for annual and quarterly national population estimates by single-year of age, five-year age groups, and selected age groups.
Subject category: Population Group: Population estimates – DPE
National population estimates: At 31 March 2019 – Infoshare tables will be released on 16 May 2019.
- Gender sex and intersex
- Population estimates and projections
